recommendations.title: Death Whisperer 2
recommendations.overview: Three years after his sister's death, Yak relentlessly searches for the dark spirit that killed her in hopes of seeking revenge.

recommendations.title: Roar
recommendations.overview: Roar follows a family who are attacked by various African animals at the secluded home of their keeper.

recommendations.title: American Ninja 5
recommendations.overview: When a scientists daughter is kidnapped, American Ninja, attempts to find her, but this time he teams up with a youngster he has trained in the ways of the ninja.

recommendations.title: Branded to Kill
recommendations.overview: After botching his latest assignment, a third-ranked Japanese hit man becomes the target of another assassin.

recommendations.title: Furious 7
recommendations.overview: Deckard Shaw seeks revenge against Dominic Toretto and his family for his comatose brother.

recommendations.title: Maximum Overdrive
recommendations.overview: When a comet passes close to the earth, machines all over the world come alive and go on homicidal rampages. A group of people at a desolate truck stop are held hostage by a gang of murderous 18-wheelers. The frightened people set out to defeat the k

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Ninja
recommendations.overview: A peaceful ex-ninja's life shatters when his son's kidnapping forces him back into violence amid an American-Japanese criminal drug war.

recommendations.title: Amazonia: The Catherine Miles Story
recommendations.overview: A young woman seeks vengeance and finds love when her parents are killed in the Amazon and she is taken prisoner by an indigenous tribe of headhunters.

recommendations.title: Female Prisoner #701: Scorpion
recommendations.overview: After being cruelly set up and deceived by Sugimi, a detective in cahoots with the mob with whom she was whole-heartedly in love, Matsushima’s desire for revenge knows no bounds.

recommendations.title: Black Butler
recommendations.genres: Horror, Fantasy, Action, Adventure, Mystery, Crime, Drama
recommendations.overview: Set in the year 2020, following her supposed death, a young woman returns as the son of her noble family to precede the family's prestigious company, with a demon at her side to avenge her parent's murder.
